steps.title: Identify the rates and variables
steps.content: Let $x$ = number of wraps and $y$ = number of bowls. Each wrap takes 1.6 minutes and each bowl takes 2.1 minutes. The employee spends a total of 50.4 minutes preparing all items.

steps.title: Build the total time equation
steps.content:
For each item type, multiply the time per item by the quantity:
  • Wraps: $1.6x$ minutes
  • Bowls: $2.1y$ minutes
Setting the sum of these times equal to the total:
$$1.6x + 2.1y = 50.4$$
That is the correct answer.
